name: Chase Sapphire Preferred® Card

welcome_offer.description: 75,000 bonus points after spending $5,000 in first 3 months (points worth $0.0125 each toward travel via Chase Travel, or ~$937 if transferred to travel partners)

earning_rates.category: Chase Travel (Flights, Hotels, Rental Cars, Cruises, Activities)
earning_rates.notes: 5x points on travel purchased through Chase Travel
3x points at restaurants including takeout and delivery
3x points at grocery stores (excluding Target, Walmart, wholesale clubs)
2x points on all other travel purchases

annual_credits.name: Hotel Stay Credit
annual_credits.description: Up to $50 in statement credits each account anniversary year for hotel stays purchased through Chase Travel

other_benefits.name: Chase Travel Portal Multiplier
other_benefits.description: Points worth 25% more when redeemed for travel via Chase Travel (1.25¢ per point)

other_benefits.name: Transfer Partners
other_benefits.description: 1:1 point transfer to leading airline/hotel partners including United, Southwest, Hyatt, Marriott, British Airways, Air France/KLM, and more

other_benefits.name: Trip Cancellation/Interruption Insurance
other_benefits.description: Up to $10,000 per person and $20,000 per trip for trip cancellation/interruption

other_benefits.name: Auto Rental Collision Damage Waiver
other_benefits.description: Primary rental car coverage (earn 3x points on rental cars)

other_benefits.name: Emergency Evacuation Coverage
other_benefits.description: Up to $100,000 for emergency medical evacuation

other_benefits.name: No Foreign Transaction Fees
other_benefits.description: Use your card abroad with no additional fees

other_benefits.name: 24/7 concierge
other_benefits.description: Access to travel and lifestyle concierge services

fhr_thc.notes: Sapphire Preferred cardholders can book FHR properties with special amenities and THC experiences

notes: One of the best mid-tier travel cards. The $95 AF is often justified by the $50 hotel credit alone. Dining + travel earning is strong. Ultimate Rewards points transfer to 14+ airline/hotel partners. Great starter card for Chase ecosystem before upgrading to Sapphire Reserve.
